Onboarding.title: Welcome
Onboarding.phase2Desc: A fast, accurate, and fair digital system
Onboarding.subtitle: How can we make your experience better?
Onboarding.phase1Desc: Hospital queues are a thing of the past
Onboarding.phase2Desc: Fast, accurate, and fair digital system
Onboarding.voicePrompt: Welcome. Please choose what suits you best. Do you need visual support, voice assistant, or standard mode?

Dashboard.doctorName: Dr. Samir Abdullah - Al Bashir Hospital
Dashboard.voiceAssistantDesc: For seniors and people with disabilities
Dashboard.voicePromptWelcome: Hello Ahmed. You have an appointment today at the Internal Medicine Clinic at 10:30 AM. You can press the track queue button to see when your turn is coming.

Tracking.title: Smart Patient Journey
Tracking.checkInDesc: Please confirm your arrival within the hospital GPS range to activate your queue position.
Tracking.checkInBtn: I am at the hospital now
Tracking.safeWish: You are now in consultation. We wish you good health.
Tracking.labDesc: The doctor has referred you for lab tests. You have been automatically added to the lab queue.
Tracking.voicePromptWaiting: You are three people away. Please wait.
Tracking.voicePromptDoctor: It is your turn now. Please enter the doctor's room.
Tracking.voicePromptLab: You have been automatically redirected to the lab. Your new number is L twenty-four.

Booking.title: Book New Appointment
Booking.step1Desc: Please upload an image of your insurance card for verification.
Booking.uploadBtn: Take or Upload Insurance Card Image
Booking.step2Desc: Your insurance image has been successfully uploaded and is now under review by the reception department to finalize pricing.
Booking.voicePromptStep1: Booking page. Please upload your insurance card image.
Booking.voicePromptStep2: Image uploaded successfully. Please continue to select an appointment time.
Booking.voicePromptStep3: Please choose a suitable time for your appointment from the available options.

Feedback.title: Complaints & Suggestions
Feedback.detailsPlaceholder: Write your complaint or suggestion details here...
Feedback.successMessage: Your request has been submitted successfully. Thank you for your feedback!
Feedback.voicePromptIntro: Complaints and suggestions page. Please select the request type, then choose the relevant target and write the details.

HospitalSelection.title: Medical Center Selection
HospitalSelection.subtitle: Please select the governorate and hospital to continue
HospitalSelection.voicePrompt: Login successful. Please select the governorate, then choose the hospital you wish to visit.

SplashScreens.phase1Subtitle: Hospital queues are a thing of the past
